debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x : α
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
hx : x ∈ G.vertexSet
⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩ := h x
  rw [Matroid.IsColoop]
  simp only [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid_E,
    IndepMatroid.matroid_Indep, Matroid.isColoop_iff_forall_mem_base]
  push_neg
  exact ⟨hx, V(G, M), ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, fun v hv => hv⟩, sorry, hxM⟩

obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩ := h x
  intro hcoloop
  exact hxM (hcoloop.mem_of_isBase sorry)

obtain ⟨M, hmax, hxM⟩ := h x
  simp only [Matroid.IsColoop, matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
  intro hcl
  have hbasis : G.matchingIndepMatroid.matroid.IsBase V(G, M) := by
    rw [IndepMatroid.matroid_isBase_iff]
    constructor
    · exact ⟨M, hmax.toIsMatching, fun v hv => hv⟩
    · intro I ⟨M', hM', hIM'⟩ hMI
      by_contra hne
      have hlt : V(G, M).encard < I.encard := by
        apply Set.encard_lt_encard
        exact ⟨hMI, fun heq => hne (heq.symm)⟩
      sorry
  sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h x
  intro hcoloop
  exact hxM (hcoloop.mem_ground_of_isBase (by sorry) |> fun _ => by sorry)

obtain ⟨M, hMax, hxM⟩ := h x

obtain ⟨M, hMax, hxM⟩ := h x
  simp only [Matroid.IsColoop, Matroid.IsLoop, Matroid.compl_cocircuit_iff_hyperplane]
  intro hloop
  have hIndep : G.matchingMatroid.Indep V(G, M) := by
    simp only [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid_Indep_iff]
    exact ⟨M, hMax.toIsMatching, fun v hv => hv⟩
  have hBasis : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase V(G, M) := by
    rw [Matroid.IsBase]
    refine ⟨hIndep, ?_⟩
    intro J hJ hMJ
    simp only [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid_Indep_iff] at hJ
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hJM'⟩ := hJ
    have hcard : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMax.max M' hM'
    have hVcard : V(G, M').encard ≤ V(G, M).encard := by
      sorry
    exact (encard_le_encard hMJ).antisymm (encard_le_encard hJM' |>.trans hVcard)
  have hxNotIn : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hVMsub : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G) := by
    intro v hv
    obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
    exact G.vertexSet_edge_subset (hMax.toIsMatching.subset he) hve
  sorry
